_schema.description: Curated log of Pakistan-relevant IMF events. Read by both brain/macro_impact.py (to surface IMF as a macro driver) and brain/playbook.py via data/playbook/_events.json mirroring (to fire the imf_sba_eff_approval / imf_review_completed playbook cases). The two backing files are kept in sync by scripts/sync_imf_events_to_playbook.py.

fields.date: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the event was announced (IMF press release date or SLA announcement date).
fields.amount_usd_mn: USD-million size of the program (for approvals) or tranche (for reviews/disbursements). Optional.
fields.decay_days: Optional. How many days the event continues to fire as an active driver. Default 21 for reviews, 60 for approvals.
fields.source: URL to the IMF press release or news source.

_schema.how_to_add_an_event: Append a new object to `events`. Run scripts/sync_imf_events_to_playbook.py after editing to mirror into data/playbook/_events.json so the playbook matcher fires the corresponding case (event:imf_sba_or_eff_approval / event:imf_review_completed).
_schema.research_basis: Pakistan-IMF program history 2019-2026. Used by playbook cases imf_sba_eff_approval and imf_review_completed (the latter retuned to d5+MIXED in the 2026-05-02 strategy fixes evaluation).
_schema.validated: scripts/validate_strategy_fixes.py confirmed (2026-05-02) that the d5 reaction is reliably positive while d21 is mixed and direction-dependent on concurrent macro drivers.

events.description: IMF Executive Board approves $6bn 39-month Extended Fund Facility for Pakistan.
IMF approves $1.386bn emergency Rapid Financing Instrument disbursement for Pakistan (COVID-19).
IMF completes 2nd-5th combined EFF reviews; ~$500m disbursement.
IMF completes 7th-8th combined EFF reviews; ~$1.17bn tranche, ending 18-month gap.
Staff-level agreement on the new 9-month $3bn SBA, replacing the lapsed EFF. Bridge to the formal board approval two weeks later.
IMF Executive Board approves $3bn 9-month Stand-By Arrangement for Pakistan; immediate $1.2bn disbursement.
IMF completes 1st SBA review; ~$700m tranche disbursed.
IMF completes 2nd and final SBA review; ~$1.1bn final tranche disbursed.
IMF Executive Board approves new $7bn 37-month Extended Fund Facility for Pakistan; immediate $1bn disbursement.
Staff-level agreement on 1st EFF review (~$1bn tranche pending board approval).
IMF completes 1st EFF review; $1.023bn tranche disbursed plus $1.4bn Resilience and Sustainability Facility access.
IMF completes 2nd EFF review; ~$1.1bn tranche disbursed.
